_description.purpose: Third-party dependency license policy for the Prompt-Hash Stellar project (itself Apache-2.0). Defines allowed, denied, and review-required license categories used by CI compliance checks.
_description.allowed: Licenses known to be permissive and compatible with Apache-2.0. Dependencies using these are automatically approved with zero friction.
_description.denied: Licenses that impose reciprocal/copyleft obligations (e.g. viral open-source), restrict commercial use, or carry patent-retaliation terms incompatible with a blockchain marketplace. Dependencies using these are blocked in CI unless an exception is recorded below.
_description.reviewRequired: Licenses that carry nuanced or conditional obligations (e.g. weak copyleft, file-level reciprocity, attribution stacking). Dependencies using these are flagged for human review. After review they are either added to exceptions or added to allowed/denied.
